sqlMap.select: SELECT PROPERTY_NAME name, PROPERTY_VALUE value FROM TBL_TENANT_CONFIG WHERE TENANT_ID=#TENANTID#
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_TENANT_CONFIG SET PROPERTY_VALUE=#value# WHERE PROPERTY_NAME=#name# AND TENANT_ID=#tenantID#
sqlMap.select: SELECT DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(C.CONNECTTIME, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%S'), INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE) AS connecttime, C.sequence, C.usernm, C.usernm2, C.deptnm, C.deptnm2, C.connectip, C.connectbrowser, C.connectos FROM TBL_CONNECTION_INFO C INNER JOIN TBL_USERLOCALINFO U ON C.USERID = U.USERID WHERE C.TENANT_ID=#v_tenantID# AND U.TENANT_ID=#v_tenantID# ORDER BY SEQUENCE DESC LIMIT #v_start#, #pageCount#
SELECT COUNT(SEQUENCE) FROM TBL_CONNECTION_INFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_tenantID#
